description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in full tactical military gear, including a padded vest with multiple pouches, a helmet with a mounted headset and microphone, and protective goggles. The figure wears long-sleeved clothing under the vest, with camouflage-patterned pants and sturdy combat boots. The arms are extended slightly outward, and the hands are gloved, suggesting readiness for action. The vest features insignia patches and a radio antenna, indicating communication equipment. The back of the figure shows a reinforced vest and a holstered item at the waist. The overall appearance is that of a modern urban soldier or security operative, equipped for high-risk environments.
description: A male adult in full tactical military gear, including helmet, vest with pouches, headset, and camouflage pants, ready for urban operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tactical vest with pouches, insignia, headset, goggles, and extended arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the helmet profile, headset, vest thickness, and holstered item at the waist.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the reinforced back of the vest, helmet, and holstered item at the lower back.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the arm patch, headset, and the side profile of the tactical gear.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical military uniform with padded vest, helmet, headset, and protective goggles
